title: Zunami Protocol - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Admin key misuse via direct contract call to withdrawStuckToken() resulting in full vault drain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls withdrawStuckToken() if the sender is the contract deployer

red_flags: emergency function used as getaway vehicle
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls withdrawStuckToken() if the sender is the contract deployer
summary: Zunami Protocol lost $500K due to an admin key being misused to call withdrawStuckToken(), draining the entire vault. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for calls to withdrawStuckToken() from the contract deployer.
